items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck before today's in-person meeting
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15: 'just finished our seed round pitch deck'. In-person meeting scheduled today May 26 at Fin Capital offices with Logan, Derek, Jake, and Claire.

items.title: Prepare portfolio pipeline updates for SMBC Atlas Beyond fund AD management meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on May 27 with 20+ SMBC, JRI, and Fin Capital attendees including Logan, Fan, Derek, Jake, Rina, and Daria.

items.title: Prepare for Navigator Webinar and Navigator Day Event back-to-back
items.context: Calendar events on May 27: 'Navigator Webinar' (12:30-2pm PT) followed by 'Navigator Day Event' (2-5pm PT) at 114 Crosby St in NYC. Full investment team attending.

items.title: Prepare for Workday Ventures partnership catch-up call
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital <> Workday Ventures' on May 28 via Zoom with Jeffrey Wantman, Savannah Greene, and Sarah Ospina from Workday. Fan and Derek attending.

items.title: Prepare portfolio update for Vanguard LP catch-up
items.context: Calendar event 'Vanguard <> Fin Capital catch-up' on May 28 via Zoom with del_giannotti@vanguard.com. Fan and Derek attending.

items.title: Finalize guest list and logistics for NYTW / CISO Breakfast co-hosted with Thoropass
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 114 Crosby St in NYC with Thoropass team (Claire Lamb, Javier Santin). Jake, Derek, Jackie, and Lauren attending.

items.title: Plan NYC Tech Week schedule and external meeting logistics (Jun 1-5)
items.context: Calendar event 'NYC Tech Week' spanning Jun 1-5, all-day event with entire Fin Capital team. Multiple events during the week including D-Wave Investor Day, CISO Breakfast, and cocktails.
